p.c: function[T0: CommRing, T2: CommRing](x0: Ideal[T0], x1: RingHom[T0, T2]) { x0.as_set ⊂ ring_hom_kernel[T0, T2](x1).as_set = ideal_le_ring_hom_kernel[T0, T2](x0, x1) }[R, S](i, f)

function[T0, T2](x0: lib(equivalence).QuotientRelation[T0], x1: T0 -> T2) { forall(x2: T0, x3: T0) { not x0.rel(x2, x3) or x1(x3) = x1(x2) } = quotient_respects[T0, T2](x0, x1) }[R, S](ideal_quotient_relation[R](i), f.hom)

goal: ideal_quotient_lift[R, S](i, f, ideal_quotient_project(i, a)) = quotient_over_lift_to[R, S](f.hom, ideal_quotient_project(i, a))

p.c: function[T0: CommRing, T1: CommRing](x0: RingHom[T0, T1], x1: QuotientOver[T0], x2: Ideal[T0]) { quotient_over_lift_to[T0, T1](x0.hom, x1) = ideal_quotient_lift[T0, T1](x2, x0, x1) }[R, S](f, ideal_quotient_project(i, a), i)

goal: ideal_quotient_lift[R, S](i, f, ideal_quotient_project(i, a)) = f.hom(a)
ideal_quotient_lift_agrees_on_projects[R, S](i, f, g) = forall(x0: R) { ideal_quotient_lift_agrees_on_project_at[R, S](i, f, g, x0) }

p.c: function[T0: CommRing, T1: CommRing](x0: Ideal[T0], x1: RingHom[T0, T1], x2: QuotientOver[T0] -> T1) { forall(x3: T0) { ideal_quotient_lift_agrees_on_project_at[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2, x3) } = ideal_quotient_lift_agrees_on_projects[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) }[R, S](i, f, g)
(forall(x0: R) { ideal_quotient_lift_agrees_on_project_at[R, S](i, f, g, x0) } = true)
function(x0: R) { ideal_quotient_lift_agrees_on_project_at[R, S](i, f, g, x0) }(lib(functions).identity_fn(a))

goal: ideal_quotient_lift_agrees_on_project_at[R, S](i, f, g, a) = (g(ideal_quotient_project(i, a)) = f.hom(a))

p.c: function[T0: CommRing, T1: CommRing](x0: QuotientOver[T1] -> T0, x1: Ideal[T1], x2: T1, x3: RingHom[T1, T0]) { x0(ideal_quotient_project[T1](x1, x2)) = x3.hom(x2) = ideal_quotient_lift_agrees_on_project_at[T1, T0](x1, x3, x0, x2) }[S, R](g, i, a, f)

goal: ideal_quotient_lift[R, S](i, f, ideal_quotient_project(i, a)) = f.hom(a)
ideal_quotient_project(i, a + b) = ideal_quotient_add[R](i, ideal_quotient_project(i, a), ideal_quotient_project(i, b))
ideal_quotient_lift[R, S](i, f, ideal_quotient_project(i, a + b)) = f.hom(a + b)
ideal_quotient_lift[R, S](i, f, ideal_quotient_project(i, a)) = f.hom(a)
ideal_quotient_lift[R, S](i, f, ideal_quotient_project(i, b)) = f.hom(b)

ideal_quotient_lift[R, S](i, f, ideal_quotient_add[R](i, ideal_quotient_project(i, a), ideal_quotient_project(i, b))) = ideal_quotient_lift[R, S](i, f, ideal_quotient_project(i, a)) + ideal_quotient_lift[R, S](i, f, ideal_quotient_project(i, b))
ideal_quotient_project(i, a * b) = ideal_quotient_mul[R](i, ideal_quotient_project(i, a), ideal_quotient_project(i, b))
ideal_quotient_lift[R, S](i, f, ideal_quotient_project(i, a * b)) = f.hom(a * b)
ideal_quotient_lift[R, S](i, f, ideal_quotient_project(i, a)) = f.hom(a)
ideal_quotient_lift[R, S](i, f, ideal_quotient_project(i, b)) = f.hom(b)

ideal_quotient_lift[R, S](i, f, ideal_quotient_mul[R](i, ideal_quotient_project(i, a), ideal_quotient_project(i, b))) = ideal_quotient_lift[R, S](i, f, ideal_quotient_project(i, a)) * ideal_quotient_lift[R, S](i, f, ideal_quotient_project(i, b))
ideal_quotient_lift[R, S](i, f, ideal_quotient_project(i, R.0)) = f.hom(R.0)
ideal_quotient_lift[R, S](i, f, ideal_quotient_project(i, R.1)) = f.hom(R.1)
ideal_quotient_lift[R, S](i, f, ideal_quotient_project(i, a)) = f.hom(a)
ideal_quotient_lift[R, S](i, f, ideal_quotient_neg[R](i, ideal_quotient_project(i, a))) = -ideal_quotient_lift[R, S](i, f, ideal_quotient_project(i, a))
